summary: Comprehensive testing of Divine Iris Healing NEW FEATURES completed. All 26 backend tests pass, frontend features verified. Fixed bug in POST endpoints for programs/sessions/testimonials where 'order' field caused duplicate keyword error.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: POST endpoints for programs/sessions/testimonials had 'order' field conflict - data.pop('order', None) added before Model instantiation
All admin panel features (visibility toggle, reorder arrows, site settings) have proper data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Database already seeded: 6 programs, 21 sessions, 44 testimonials (32 graphic + 12 video), site_settings document
context_for_next_testing_agent: All NEW features tested and working: Admin panel - Programs tab (6 items with visibility toggle eye icon, up/down reorder arrows, edit, delete), Sessions tab (21 items with same controls), Testimonials tab (44 items with type badge graphic/video, visibility toggle), Site Settings tab (font selector dropdown with Playfair Display etc, color pickers for heading/body/accent, size selectors). Services page (/services) has sidebar with 21 sessions, clicking changes detail. Transformations page (/transformations) has 32 graphic + 12 video testimonials with real-time search and All/Graphic/Video tab filtering. Footer and menu overlay both have TRANSFORMATIONS link. SiteSettingsProvider dynamically loads Google Fonts.

admin_panel.programs_tab: PASS - 6 programs with visibility toggle, reorder arrows, edit, delete
admin_panel.testimonials_tab: PASS - 44 items (32 graphic + 12 video) with type badge, visibility toggle, edit, delete
admin_panel.site_settings_tab: PASS - Font selectors (Playfair Display, Cinzel, etc), color pickers, size selectors

api_endpoints.PATCH /api/programs/reorder: PASS - Reorders programs by ID list
api_endpoints.GET /api/settings: PASS - Returns site settings with fonts/colors/sizes

services_page.session_switching: PASS - Clicking tab changes detail on right
services_page.view_details_btn: PASS - VIEW DETAILS & BOOK button present

navigation.menu_transformations: PASS - TRANSFORMATIONS link in golden menu overlay

POST_endpoints_order_conflict.issue: POST /api/programs, /api/sessions, /api/testimonials returned 500 error 'got multiple values for keyword argument order'
POST_endpoints_order_conflict.root_cause: ProgramCreate/SessionCreate/TestimonialCreate models have optional 'order' field with default. When request body included 'order', it conflicted with 'order=count' passed to Model constructor
POST_endpoints_order_conflict.fix: Added data.pop('order', None) before Model instantiation in all 3 routes
